title: Toggle Group
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Toggle Group primitive preserving grouped pressed state, single and multiple selection, disabled items, orientation, roving focus metadata, aria-pressed, and data attributes.

deviations.summary: Foldkit consumers own Toggle Group selection and highlight state instead of using React uncontrolled defaultValue.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit registry components preserve Elm-style unidirectional data flow. The helper emits value and highlight change facts while the consuming model remains the single source of truth.
